creator: beech@alaskaparadise.com
text:
Maintainer Timeout
Added PORTDOCS
Merged patches
Submitter is cc'd


diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox.orig/Makefile /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox.orig/Makefile	Sat Aug  5 06:39:52 2006
+++ /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox/Makefile	Thu Mar  8 02:07:24 2007
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 # ex: ts=8
 
 PORTNAME=	ircd-ratbox
-PORTVERSION=	2.2.3
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.4
 CATEGORIES=	irc ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.ircd-ratbox.org/pub/ircd-ratbox/	\
 		ftp://ftp.demon.co.uk/pub/mirrors/ircd-ratbox/	\
@@ -35,7 +35,13 @@
 		--with-moduledir=${PREFIX}/lib/${PORTNAME}/modules \
 		--with-helpdir=${DATADIR}/help
 
-PORTDOCS=	[^i]*.txt README.* technical/[^i]*.txt Tao-of-IRC.*
+PORTDOCSdoc=	CIDR.txt README.cidr_bans Tao-of-IRC.940110 
challenge.txt	\
+	hooks.txt logfiles.txt modeg.txt modes.txt monitor.txt operguide.txt	
\
+	opermyth.txt services.txt tgchange.txt
+PORTDOCStech=	cluster.txt event.txt fd-management.txt 
file-management.txt	\
+	hostmask.txt index.txt linebuf.txt network.txt rfc1459.txt	\
+	send.txt ts5.txt ts6.txt
+PORTDOCS=	${PORTDOCSdoc} ${PORTDOCStech}
 
 #-- 
Options ------------------------------------------------------------
 
@@ -127,9 +133,15 @@
 
 post-install:
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	cd ${WRKSRC}/doc && ${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS} ${DOCSDIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/ircd-ratbox
+.for f in ${PORTDOCSdoc}
+	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/${f} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/ircd-ratbox
+.endfor
+.for f in ${PORTDOCStech}
+	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/technical/${f} 
${PREFIX}/share/doc/ircd-ratbox
+.endfor
 .endif
+
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/ircd.motd 
${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}/ircd.motd.sample
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/example.conf 
${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}/ircd.conf.sample
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/doc/example.efnet.conf 
${PREFIX}/etc/${PORTNAME}/ircd-efnet.conf.sample
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox.orig/distinfo /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox.orig/distinfo	Sat Aug  5 06:39:52 2006
+++ /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox/distinfo	Wed Mar  7 21:27:21 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (ircd-ratbox-2.2.3.tgz) = 5ddd1bf42ebcb139404fb8305c21fdfa
-SHA256 (ircd-ratbox-2.2.3.tgz) = 
76e674cd1268c33c7278db95a61cc9186426f91d9453036f1153b591c1db1fbb
-SIZE (ircd-ratbox-2.2.3.tgz) = 704681
+MD5 (ircd-ratbox-2.2.4.tgz) = 5b1aafe92b347bbd80f5e0130bfa2516
+SHA256 (ircd-ratbox-2.2.4.tgz) = 
cc5214af418c2d23403d50e983bb693f3e6ec10deb4b764bebcc9059c60aaa1f
+SIZE (ircd-ratbox-2.2.4.tgz) = 708497
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox.orig/files/pkg-message.in /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox/files/pkg-message.in
--- /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox.orig/files/pkg-message.in	Thu Jan 26 
21:09:27 2006
+++ /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox/files/pkg-message.in	Thu Mar  8 
02:14:53 2007
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 Once you have added ircd_ratbox_enable="YES" to /etc/rc.conf, the
 server can be started by running:
 
-	%%PREFIX%%/etc/rc.d/ircd-ratbox.sh start
+	%%PREFIX%%/etc/rc.d/ircd-ratbox. start
 
 Be sure to check out 'ratbox-services' if you need a services 
package.
 ------------------------------------------------------------------------
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox.orig/pkg-plist /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox.orig/pkg-plist	Sat Aug  5 06:39:52 2006
+++ /usr/ports/irc/ircd-ratbox/pkg-plist	Thu Mar  8 02:12:06 2007
@@ -71,13 +71,13 @@
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/m_okick.so
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/m_olist.so
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/m_opme.so
+lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/m_webirc.so
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/spy_admin_notice.so
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/spy_info_notice.so
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/spy_links_notice.so
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/spy_motd_notice.so
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/spy_stats_notice.so
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/spy_stats_p_notice.so
-lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/spy_trace_notice.so
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/spy_whois_notice.so
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib/spy_whois_notice_global.so
 lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/m_die.so
@@ -220,10 +220,6 @@
 %%DATADIR%%/help/users/who
 %%DATADIR%%/help/users/whois
 %%DATADIR%%/help/users/whowas
-@dirrm lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/autoload
-@dirrm lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib
-@dirrm lib/ircd-ratbox/modules
-@dirrm lib/ircd-ratbox
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/help/users
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/help/opers
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%/help
@@ -232,6 +228,10 @@
 @unexec f="%D/etc/ircd-ratbox/kline.conf"; if [ ! -s "$f" ]; then 
rm -f "$f"; fi
 @unexec f="%D/etc/ircd-ratbox/resv.conf";  if [ ! -s "$f" ]; then 
rm -f "$f"; fi
 @unexec f="%D/etc/ircd-ratbox/xline.conf"; if [ ! -s "$f" ]; then 
rm -f "$f"; fi
+@dirrm lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/contrib
+@dirrm lib/ircd-ratbox/modules/autoload
+@dirrm lib/ircd-ratbox/modules
+@dirrm lib/ircd-ratbox
 @dirrmtry etc/ircd-ratbox
-@unexec rmdir %%LOGDIR%% 2>/dev/null || true
-@unexec rmdir %%RUNDIR%% 2>/dev/null || true
+@dirrmtry %%LOGDIR%% 2>/dev/null || true
+@dirrmtry %%RUNDIR%% 2>/dev/null || true

--
